summary: Backend refactoring verification completed. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend dashboard, portfolios, wallet pages load correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports. Modular structure (config, database, models, routers, services, utils) is working properly with main endpoints still running from server.py.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height 0 or -1) - non-critical, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - returns 200 with session_token, user_id, role, account_number
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials - returns 401
GET /api/auth/me - returns user data with balances, tier, kyc_status
GET /api/auth/me without auth - returns 401
GET /api/portfolios - returns list of active portfolios with correct structure
GET /api/portfolios/{id} - returns single portfolio details
GET /api/portfolios/{invalid_id} - returns 404
GET /api/portfolios/featured - returns featured portfolios
GET /api/user/transactions - returns user transaction history
GET /api/user/profit-analytics - returns profit data with monthly breakdown
GET /api/investments - returns user investments list
POST /api/investments - creates investment with signature (requires KYC or can_invest_without_kyc)
GET /api/admin/users - returns user list (admin only)
GET /api/admin/dashboard - returns dashboard stats (admin only)
Frontend landing page loads with portfolio stats ($127M, 18.4%, 2,847)
Frontend login page works with email/password authentication
Frontend dashboard shows user greeting, balances, income chart, contracts
Frontend portfolios page shows 3 portfolio cards with risk levels
Frontend wallet page shows available/invested balances, deposit history
Mobile dashboard responsive design working
Mobile portfolios page with search and portfolio cards
Mobile wallet page with balance cards and transaction tabs
Mobile settings page with user profile, KYC status, language settings
Mobile history page with operations and contracts tabs
critical_code_review_comments: Backend modular structure created correctly - config.py, database.py, models/schemas.py, routers/, services/, utils/ all present
Main endpoints still run from server.py (3800+ lines) - routers are duplicates not yet integrated
Chart dimension warnings in console are cosmetic - charts render correctly after initial load
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user and portfolios
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring in progress. New modular files created in /app/backend/ (config.py, database.py, models/schemas.py, routers/, services/, utils/) but main endpoints still run from server.py. All APIs working correctly. Mobile viewport 390x844 for testing. Use :visible selector when multiple elements exist. Admin user has can_invest_without_kyc=true and kyc_status=approved. 18 active contracts exist for admin user.
